name: opencode-manager
description: Mobile-first web interface for OpenCode AI agents. Manage, control, and code with multiple OpenCode agents from any device - your phone, tablet, or desktop. Features Git integration, file management, and real-time chat in a responsive PWA. Deploy with Docker for instant setup.
summaryZh: Mobile-first web interface for OpenCode AI agents. Manage, control, and code with multiple OpenCode agents from any device - your phone, tablet, or desktop. Features Git integration, file management, and real-time chat in a responsive PWA. Deploy with Docker for instant setup. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
